---
title: "AHBA C3 Developmental Trends — GRN Projection (Multi-Pseudobulk)"
format: md
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
---

## 1. Setup

### 1.1 Environment

```{python}
import os
import sys
import warnings
from IPython import get_ipython
_ip = get_ipython()
if _ip:
    _ip.run_line_magic('load_ext', 'autoreload')
    _ip.run_line_magic('autoreload', '2')
```

```{python}
def _find_repo_root(marker='.git'):
    current = os.path.abspath(os.getcwd())
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(current, marker)):
            return current
        parent = os.path.dirname(current)
        if parent == current:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Could not find '{marker}' above {os.getcwd()}")
        current = parent

_repo_root = _find_repo_root()
if os.path.join(_repo_root, 'code') not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(_repo_root, 'code'))

from environment import get_environment
_env = get_environment()
rds_dir  = _env['rds_dir']
code_dir = _env['code_dir']
ref_dir  = _env['ref_dir']

print(f"Environment : {_env['name']}")
print(f"  rds_dir  : {rds_dir}")
print(f"  code_dir : {code_dir}")
print(f"  ref_dir  : {ref_dir}")
```

### 1.2 Parameters

Parameters are loaded from a YAML config file whose path is passed via the
`NOTEBOOK_PARAMS` environment variable (set automatically by `render_single.sh`
or `step5_notebook.sh`).

When `PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS` is present, the analysis runs for each listed input and
results are grouped by plot type below.  When only `PSEUDOBULK_FILE` is present
(legacy / single-run mode), it is wrapped into a one-entry list automatically.

Defaults below are used when no config is provided (interactive mode).

```{python}
import yaml as _yaml

_cfg = {}
_param_file = os.environ.get('NOTEBOOK_PARAMS', '')
if _param_file:
    print(f"Loading params from: {_param_file}")
    with open(_param_file) as _f:
        _cfg = _yaml.safe_load(_f) or {}
else:
    print("No NOTEBOOK_PARAMS set — using defaults (interactive mode)")

# --- Experiment identity ---
EXPERIMENT_NAME = _cfg.get('EXPERIMENT_NAME', 'grn_dev_multi_interactive')

# --- Pseudobulk inputs ---
# Accept either PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS (list) or legacy PSEUDOBULK_FILE (string).
_MAX_INPUTS = 4
if 'PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS' in _cfg:
    PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS = _cfg['PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS'][:_MAX_INPUTS]
    if len(_cfg['PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS']) > _MAX_INPUTS:
        print(f"WARNING: {len(_cfg['PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS'])} inputs specified; "
              f"only the first {_MAX_INPUTS} will be used.")
elif 'PSEUDOBULK_FILE' in _cfg:
    PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS = [{
        'name':             EXPERIMENT_NAME,
        'file':             _cfg['PSEUDOBULK_FILE'],
        'cell_class_col':   _cfg.get('CELL_CLASS_COL',  'cell_class') or '',
        'cell_class_value': _cfg.get('CELL_CLASS_VALUE', 'Excitatory') or '',
    }]
else:
    _pb_default = os.path.join(
        rds_dir,
        'Cam_snRNAseq/integrated/VelWangPsychAD_100k_prepost_tuning3',
        'pseudobulk_output/by_cell_class.h5ad')
    PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS = [{
        'name':             'by_cell_class_Excitatory',
        'file':             _pb_default,
        'cell_class_col':   'cell_class',
        'cell_class_value': 'Excitatory',
    }]

# --- HVG selection ---
N_VALUES = _cfg.get('N_VALUES', [4000])

# --- 4D sensitivity axes ---
CHILD_STARTS = _cfg.get('CHILD_STARTS', [1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
GAP_STARTS   = _cfg.get('GAP_STARTS',   [8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14])
GAP_LENGTHS  = _cfg.get('GAP_LENGTHS',  [0, 1, 2, 3, 4])
ADOL_ENDS    = _cfg.get('ADOL_ENDS',    [18, 20, 22, 24, 26])

version_names = [inp['name'] for inp in PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS]

print(f"\nEXPERIMENT_NAME : {EXPERIMENT_NAME}")
print(f"N inputs        : {len(PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS)}")
for inp in PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS:
    _filt = (f"{inp['cell_class_col']} == '{inp['cell_class_value']}'"
             if inp.get('cell_class_col') and inp.get('cell_class_value') else 'none')
    print(f"  [{inp['name']}]  filter={_filt}")
    print(f"    {inp['file']}")
print(f"N_VALUES        : {N_VALUES}")
print(f"CHILD_STARTS    : {CHILD_STARTS}")
print(f"GAP_STARTS      : {GAP_STARTS}")
print(f"GAP_LENGTHS     : {GAP_LENGTHS}")
print(f"ADOL_ENDS       : {ADOL_ENDS}")
```

### 1.3 Libraries

```{python}
#| include: false
import gc
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import scipy.sparse as _sp
from collections import OrderedDict
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

if _env['name'] == 'local':
    os.environ['R_HOME'] = '/Users/richard/mambaforge/envs/scanpy/lib/R'

%load_ext rpy2.ipython
```

```{python}
#| include: false
%%R

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggpubr)
library(pwr)
```

## 2. Data & GRN Projection

### 2.1 GRN Setup (shared across all inputs)

```{python}
from hvg_investigation import setup_grn

# Load first input just to initialise GRN (all inputs share the same gene set).
_ref_adata = sc.read_h5ad(PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS[0]['file'], backed='r')
ahba_GRN, total_grn_genes = setup_grn(ref_dir, _ref_adata)
_grn_pivot = ahba_GRN.pivot_table(
    index='Network', columns='Gene', values='Importance', fill_value=0)
_ref_adata.file.close()
del _ref_adata
gc.collect()
```

### 2.2 Load & Project All Inputs

```{python}
from regulons import project_GRN

def _project_and_collect(adata, ahba_GRN, condition_name, use_highly_variable=False):
    project_GRN(adata, ahba_GRN, 'X_ahba',
                use_residuals=False, use_highly_variable=use_highly_variable,
                log_transform=False)
    return (pd.DataFrame(adata.obsm['X_ahba'], index=adata.obs_names,
                         columns=adata.uns['X_ahba_names'])[['C3+', 'C3-']]
              .assign(obs_names=lambda d: d.index, condition=condition_name)
              .melt(id_vars=['obs_names', 'condition'], var_name='C', value_name='value'))


def _load_and_project(inp):
    """Load one pseudobulk input, filter, project GRN, return results dict."""
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"Input: {inp['name']}")
    print(f"  File: {inp['file']}")

    adata_full = sc.read_h5ad(inp['file'], backed='r')
    print(f"  Full shape: {adata_full.shape}")

    cc_col = inp.get('cell_class_col', '') or ''
    cc_val = inp.get('cell_class_value', '') or ''
    if cc_col and cc_val:
        if cc_col not in adata_full.obs.columns:
            raise ValueError(
                f"cell_class_col='{cc_col}' not found in obs of {inp['file']}. "
                f"Available: {list(adata_full.obs.columns)}")
        print(f"  Cell classes: {dict(adata_full.obs[cc_col].value_counts())}")
        mask = adata_full.obs[cc_col] == cc_val
        adata = adata_full[mask].to_memory()
    else:
        adata = adata_full.to_memory()

    adata_full.file.close()
    del adata_full
    gc.collect()

    print(f"  Subset shape : {adata.shape}")
    print(f"  Donors       : {adata.n_obs}")
    print(f"  Age range    : {adata.obs.age_years.min():.2f} – "
          f"{adata.obs.age_years.max():.2f} years")
    print(f"  Sources      : {dict(adata.obs['source'].value_counts())}")

    total_genes = int(adata.n_vars)
    all_scores = []

    # ── Method 1: CPM normalization on raw counts ──────────────────────────────
    adata.X = adata.layers['counts'].copy()
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e6, inplace=True)
    _cpm_X = (adata.X.toarray() if _sp.issparse(adata.X) else adata.X).copy()
    print(f"  CPM: {adata.n_vars} genes, {adata.n_obs} donors.")

    adata.X = _cpm_X.copy()
    if 'highly_variable' in adata.var.columns:
        del adata.var['highly_variable']
    all_scores.append(_project_and_collect(adata, ahba_GRN, 'cpm_all'))

    for n in N_VALUES:
        sc.experimental.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata, n_top_genes=n, layer='counts')
        adata.X = _cpm_X.copy()
        all_scores.append(_project_and_collect(adata, ahba_GRN, f'cpm_{n}',
                                               use_highly_variable=True))

    _cpm_raw_X = _cpm_X.copy()
    del _cpm_X

    # ── Method 2: scANVI batch-corrected ───────────────────────────────────────
    if 'scanvi_normalized' not in adata.layers:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Layer 'scanvi_normalized' not found in {inp['file']}. "
            f"Available layers: {list(adata.layers.keys())}")
    _raw = adata.layers['scanvi_normalized']
    _scanvi_X = (_raw.toarray() if _sp.issparse(_raw)
                 else np.array(_raw, dtype=np.float32)).copy()
    _gene_vars = _scanvi_X.var(axis=0)

    adata.X = _scanvi_X.copy()
    if 'highly_variable' in adata.var.columns:
        del adata.var['highly_variable']
    all_scores.append(_project_and_collect(adata, ahba_GRN, 'scanvi_all'))

    for n in N_VALUES:
        top_idx = np.argsort(_gene_vars)[::-1][:n]
        adata.var['highly_variable'] = False
        adata.var.iloc[top_idx, adata.var.columns.get_loc('highly_variable')] = True
        adata.X = _scanvi_X.copy()
        all_scores.append(_project_and_collect(adata, ahba_GRN, f'scanvi_{n}',
                                               use_highly_variable=True))
    del _scanvi_X, _gene_vars

    scores_df = pd.concat(all_scores, ignore_index=True)

    # ── Build final_df with donor metadata ─────────────────────────────────────
    if 'source-chemistry' in adata.obs.columns:
        adata.obs['source_chemistry'] = adata.obs['source-chemistry']
    elif 'chemistry' in adata.obs.columns:
        adata.obs['source_chemistry'] = (
            adata.obs['source'].astype(object).fillna('unknown').astype(str) + '-' +
            adata.obs['chemistry'].astype(object).fillna('unknown').astype(str))
    else:
        adata.obs['source_chemistry'] = adata.obs['source']

    cols = ['individual', 'age_years', 'source', 'source_chemistry']
    for c in ['sex', 'dataset']:
        if c in adata.obs.columns:
            cols.append(c)
    meta = adata.obs[cols].copy()
    meta['obs_names'] = meta.index

    final_df = pd.merge(scores_df, meta, on='obs_names')
    print(f"  final_df: {len(final_df)} rows × {final_df.shape[1]} cols")

    gc.collect()
    return {
        'adata':      adata,
        'final_df':   final_df,
        'cpm_raw_X':  _cpm_raw_X,
        'total_genes': total_genes,
    }


all_results = OrderedDict()
for _inp in PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS:
    all_results[_inp['name']] = _load_and_project(_inp)

# Combined dataframe with version tag (used by R)
combined_df = pd.concat(
    [r['final_df'].assign(pb_version=name) for name, r in all_results.items()],
    ignore_index=True)

TOTAL_GENES = all_results[version_names[0]]['total_genes']
print(f"\nCombined: {len(combined_df)} rows across {len(all_results)} inputs")
```

## 3. Age Range Sensitivity (4D Grid)

We independently vary four age-range parameters across all pseudobulk inputs.

| Parameter | Values | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `child_start` | `CHILD_STARTS` | Childhood lower bound |
| `gap_start` | `GAP_STARTS` | Childhood upper bound (= gap start) |
| `gap_length` | `GAP_LENGTHS` | Gap duration; `adol_start = gap_start + gap_length` |
| `adol_end` | `ADOL_ENDS` | Adolescence upper bound |

### 3.1 Compute Sensitivity Grids

```{python}
%%R -i combined_df -i code_dir -i CHILD_STARTS -i GAP_STARTS -i GAP_LENGTHS -i ADOL_ENDS -i N_VALUES -i version_names -i TOTAL_GENES

source(file.path(code_dir, 'plotting', 'hvg_plots.r'))
source(file.path(code_dir, 'plotting', 'sensitivity_gap_plots.r'))

selected_conds <- c('cpm_all', paste0('cpm_', N_VALUES),
                    'scanvi_all', paste0('scanvi_', N_VALUES))

facet_levels <- c(paste0("all\n(", TOTAL_GENES, ")"), rev(as.character(N_VALUES)))

# Per-version sensitivity grids and best-range selection
df_list   <- list()
sens_list <- list()
best_list <- list()

for (vname in version_names) {
    df_v <- combined_df %>% filter(pb_version == vname)
    df_list[[vname]] <- prepare_r_data_single(df_v, condition_order = selected_conds)
    sens_list[[vname]] <- compute_sensitivity_4d(
        df_list[[vname]], selected_conds,
        child_starts = CHILD_STARTS,
        gap_starts   = GAP_STARTS,
        gap_lengths  = GAP_LENGTHS,
        adol_ends    = ADOL_ENDS)
    best_list[[vname]] <- select_best_4d(sens_list[[vname]], baseline = 'scanvi_all')
    b <- best_list[[vname]]
    cat(sprintf(
        "\n[%s]\n  Grid: %d combos | significant: %d\n  Best: %s  p=%.4f  d=%.2f\n  Age: child[%d,%d) gap[%d,%d) adol[%d,%d)\n",
        vname,
        nrow(sens_list[[vname]]) / length(selected_conds),
        sum(sens_list[[vname]]$signif, na.rm = TRUE),
        b$condition, b$p_value, b$cohens_d,
        b$child_start, b$gap_start, b$gap_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_end))
}
```

### 3.3 P-value (blue = negative Cohen's d, red = positive)

```{python}
display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 1: {version_names[0]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 220 -h 160 -u mm -r 300

vname <- version_names[1]
print(
    plot_4d_pvalue_signed(sens_list[[vname]], filter_cond = best_list[[vname]]$condition) +
    labs(title = sprintf('%s — C3+ p-value [HVG: %s]  blue=neg d, red=pos d',
                         vname, best_list[[vname]]$condition))
)
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 2:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 2: {version_names[1]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 220 -h 160 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 2) {
    vname <- version_names[2]
    print(
        plot_4d_pvalue_signed(sens_list[[vname]], filter_cond = best_list[[vname]]$condition) +
        labs(title = sprintf('%s — C3+ p-value [HVG: %s]  blue=neg d, red=pos d',
                             vname, best_list[[vname]]$condition))
    )
}
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 3:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 3: {version_names[2]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 220 -h 160 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 3) {
    vname <- version_names[3]
    print(
        plot_4d_pvalue_signed(sens_list[[vname]], filter_cond = best_list[[vname]]$condition) +
        labs(title = sprintf('%s — C3+ p-value [HVG: %s]  blue=neg d, red=pos d',
                             vname, best_list[[vname]]$condition))
    )
}
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 4:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 4: {version_names[3]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 220 -h 160 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 4) {
    vname <- version_names[4]
    print(
        plot_4d_pvalue_signed(sens_list[[vname]], filter_cond = best_list[[vname]]$condition) +
        labs(title = sprintf('%s — C3+ p-value [HVG: %s]  blue=neg d, red=pos d',
                             vname, best_list[[vname]]$condition))
    )
}
```

## 4. Developmental Trends (Best Age Range per Input)

All plots use scANVI sensitivity-selected age boundaries for scANVI panels and
fixed boundaries (childhood 1–9, adolescence 9–25) for CPM panels.

```{python}
%%R

# Shared helper functions (identical to grn_dev_v2)
make_traj_plot <- function(pb_data, cs, ce, as_, ae, y_label, title, subtitle) {
    ggplot(pb_data, aes(x = age_years, y = value)) +
        facet_wrap(~ n_genes, scales = 'free', ncol = 1) +
        annotate('rect', xmin = ce, xmax = as_,
                 ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = 'grey80', alpha = 0.3) +
        geom_point(aes(color = source_chemistry), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
        geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), se = FALSE, color = 'black', linewidth = 0.5) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = cs,  linetype = 'dotted', color = 'blue', linewidth = 0.3) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = ce,  linetype = 'dashed', color = 'red',  linewidth = 0.4) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = as_, linetype = 'dashed', color = 'red',  linewidth = 0.4) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = ae,  linetype = 'dotted', color = 'blue', linewidth = 0.3) +
        scale_x_continuous(name = 'Donor Age (years)', limits = c(0, 30), breaks = seq(0, 30, 5)) +
        scale_y_continuous(name = y_label) +
        scale_color_discrete(name = 'Source-chemistry',
            guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
        theme_classic() +
        theme(text = element_text(size = 8), strip.text = element_text(size = 7),
              strip.background = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
              panel.spacing = unit(0.3, 'lines')) +
        ggtitle(title, subtitle = subtitle)
}

make_box_plot <- function(df_boxes_data, y_label, title) {
    ggplot(df_boxes_data, aes(x = age_range, y = value)) +
        facet_wrap(~ n_genes, scales = 'free', ncol = 1) +
        geom_boxplot(aes(alpha = box_alpha), outlier.shape = NA) +
        geom_jitter(aes(color = source_chemistry, alpha = pt_alpha), width = 0.15, size = 1.5) +
        scale_alpha_identity(guide = 'none') +
        stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c('Childhood', 'Adolescence'),
                                              c('Adolescence', 'Early Adult'),
                                              c('Early Adult', 'Late Adult')),
                           label = 'p.signif', size = 3) +
        scale_y_continuous(name = y_label) +
        scale_color_discrete(name = 'Source-chemistry',
            guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
        coord_cartesian(clip = 'off') +
        theme_classic() +
        theme(text = element_text(size = 8), strip.text = element_text(size = 7),
              strip.background = element_blank(),
              axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7),
              axis.title.x = element_blank(),
              panel.spacing = unit(0.3, 'lines')) +
        ggtitle(title)
}

make_version_panel <- function(vname, df_dec_v, best) {
    FIX_CS <- 1L; FIX_CE <- 9L; FIX_AS <- 9L; FIX_AE <- 25L
    best_cs <- best$child_start; best_ce <- best$gap_start
    best_as <- best$adol_start;  best_ae <- best$adol_end

    prep_pb <- function(flavor_str, cs, ce, as_, ae) {
        df_dec_v %>%
            filter(C == 'C3+', flavor == flavor_str) %>%
            group_by(condition, n_genes, individual, age_years, source, source_chemistry) %>%
            summarize(value = mean(value), .groups = 'drop') %>%
            group_by(condition) %>%
            mutate(value = (value - mean(value)) / sd(value)) %>%
            ungroup()
    }
    prep_boxes <- function(flavor_str, cs, ce, as_, ae) {
        make_boxes_gap_df(df_dec_v %>% filter(flavor == flavor_str), cs, ce, as_, ae) %>%
            filter(network == 'C3+') %>%
            decorate_hvg_facets() %>%
            group_by(condition) %>%
            mutate(value    = (value - mean(value)) / sd(value),
                   box_alpha = ifelse(age_range == 'Gap', 0.3, 0.4),
                   pt_alpha  = ifelse(age_range == 'Gap', 0.3, 0.7)) %>%
            ungroup()
    }

    pb_cpm    <- prep_pb('cpm',    FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE)
    boxes_cpm <- prep_boxes('cpm', FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE)

    pb_scanvi    <- prep_pb('scanvi',    best_cs, best_ce, best_as, best_ae)
    boxes_scanvi <- prep_boxes('scanvi', best_cs, best_ce, best_as, best_ae)

    p_traj_cpm <- make_traj_plot(pb_cpm, FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE,
        'C3+ score (z-scored)',
        sprintf('%s — CPM trajectories', vname),
        sprintf('Childhood [%d, %d), Adolescence [%d, %d)', FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE))
    p_box_cpm <- make_box_plot(boxes_cpm, 'C3+ score (z-scored)',
        sprintf('CPM: Childhood [%d, %d) vs Adolescence [%d, %d)', FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE))

    p_traj_scanvi <- make_traj_plot(pb_scanvi, best_cs, best_ce, best_as, best_ae,
        'C3+ score (z-scored)',
        sprintf('%s — scANVI trajectories', vname),
        sprintf('Childhood [%d, %d), gap [%d, %d), Adolescence [%d, %d)',
                best_cs, best_ce, best_ce, best_as, best_as, best_ae))
    p_box_scanvi <- make_box_plot(boxes_scanvi, 'C3+ score (z-scored)',
        sprintf('scANVI: Childhood [%d, %d) vs Adolescence [%d, %d)',
                best_cs, best_ce, best_as, best_ae))

    (p_traj_cpm | p_box_cpm) / (p_traj_scanvi | p_box_scanvi) +
        plot_layout(guides = 'collect')
}

decorate_hvg_facets <- function(data_tbl) {
    data_tbl %>%
        mutate(
            flavor = case_when(
                grepl('cpm',    condition) ~ 'cpm',
                grepl('scanvi', condition) ~ 'scanvi',
                TRUE ~ 'other'),
            n_genes = case_when(
                condition %in% c('cpm_all', 'scanvi_all') ~
                    paste0("all\n(", TOTAL_GENES, ")"),
                grepl('_(\\d+)$', as.character(condition)) ~
                    gsub('.*_(\\d+)$', '\\1', as.character(condition)),
                TRUE ~ as.character(condition)),
            n_genes = factor(n_genes, levels = facet_levels))
}
```

### 4.1 Pseudobulk Trajectories + Stage Boxes

```{python}
display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 1: {version_names[0]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

vname  <- version_names[1]
df_dec <- df_list[[vname]] %>% decorate_hvg_facets()
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    print(make_version_panel(vname, df_dec, best_list[[vname]]))
))
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 2:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 2: {version_names[1]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 2) {
    vname  <- version_names[2]
    df_dec <- df_list[[vname]] %>% decorate_hvg_facets()
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        print(make_version_panel(vname, df_dec, best_list[[vname]]))
    ))
}
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 3:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 3: {version_names[2]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 3) {
    vname  <- version_names[3]
    df_dec <- df_list[[vname]] %>% decorate_hvg_facets()
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        print(make_version_panel(vname, df_dec, best_list[[vname]]))
    ))
}
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 4:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 4: {version_names[3]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 4) {
    vname  <- version_names[4]
    df_dec <- df_list[[vname]] %>% decorate_hvg_facets()
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        print(make_version_panel(vname, df_dec, best_list[[vname]]))
    ))
}
```

### 4.2 Unweighted Sum of Top-1000 C3+ Genes

```{python}
# Compute top-1000 C3+ gene sets (shared gene universe across all inputs)
_top_c3 = (ahba_GRN[ahba_GRN['Network'] == 'C3+']
           .nlargest(1000, 'Importance')['Gene'].values)

# Build per-version unweighted_df, tagged with pb_version
_uw_rows = []
for _vname, _res in all_results.items():
    _a   = _res['adata']
    _cpm = _res['cpm_raw_X']
    sc.experimental.pp.highly_variable_genes(_a, n_top_genes=4000, layer='counts')
    _hvg4000      = _a.var_names[_a.var['highly_variable']]
    _top_c3_all   = np.intersect1d(_top_c3, _a.var_names)
    _top_c3_hvg   = np.intersect1d(_top_c3_all, _hvg4000)
    print(f"[{_vname}] Top-1000 C3+ (all): {len(_top_c3_all)}, "
          f"∩HVG4000: {len(_top_c3_hvg)}")

    _scanvi_raw = _a.layers['scanvi_normalized']
    _scanvi_arr = (_scanvi_raw.toarray() if _sp.issparse(_scanvi_raw)
                   else np.array(_scanvi_raw, dtype=np.float32))

    _meta = _a.obs[['individual', 'age_years', 'source', 'source_chemistry']].copy()
    _meta['obs_names'] = _meta.index

    for _label, _genes in [('all', _top_c3_all), ('4000', _top_c3_hvg)]:
        _idx = np.array([np.where(_a.var_names == g)[0][0] for g in _genes])
        _uw_rows.extend([
            _meta.assign(condition='cpm_unweighted',    C='C3+', n_genes=_label,
                         pb_version=_vname, value=_cpm[:, _idx].sum(axis=1)),
            _meta.assign(condition='scanvi_unweighted', C='C3+', n_genes=_label,
                         pb_version=_vname, value=_scanvi_arr[:, _idx].sum(axis=1)),
        ])
    del _top_c3_all, _top_c3_hvg, _hvg4000, _scanvi_arr, _idx

unweighted_combined = pd.concat(_uw_rows, ignore_index=True)
del _uw_rows, _top_c3
```

```{python}
%%R -i unweighted_combined -i version_names

uw_list <- list()
for (vname in version_names) {
    uw_list[[vname]] <- unweighted_combined %>%
        filter(pb_version == vname) %>%
        mutate(
            flavor    = ifelse(grepl('cpm', condition), 'cpm', 'scanvi'),
            n_genes   = factor(n_genes, levels = c('all', '4000')),
            age_years = as.numeric(age_years))
}

make_uw_panel <- function(vname, df42) {
    FIX_CS <- 1L; FIX_CE <- 9L; FIX_AS <- 9L; FIX_AE <- 25L
    b <- best_list[[vname]]

    prep_pb42 <- function(flavor_str) {
        df42 %>%
            filter(C == 'C3+', flavor == flavor_str) %>%
            group_by(condition, n_genes, individual, age_years, source, source_chemistry) %>%
            summarize(value = mean(value), .groups = 'drop') %>%
            group_by(condition, n_genes) %>%
            mutate(value = (value - mean(value)) / sd(value)) %>%
            ungroup()
    }
    prep_boxes42 <- function(flavor_str, cs, ce, as_, ae) {
        bind_rows(lapply(levels(df42$n_genes), function(ng) {
            make_boxes_gap_df(df42 %>% filter(flavor == flavor_str, n_genes == ng),
                              cs, ce, as_, ae) %>%
                filter(network == 'C3+') %>%
                mutate(n_genes = factor(ng, levels = levels(df42$n_genes)))
        })) %>%
            group_by(condition, n_genes) %>%
            mutate(value    = (value - mean(value)) / sd(value),
                   box_alpha = ifelse(age_range == 'Gap', 0.3, 0.4),
                   pt_alpha  = ifelse(age_range == 'Gap', 0.3, 0.7)) %>%
            ungroup()
    }

    p_traj_cpm <- make_traj_plot(prep_pb42('cpm'), FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE,
        'Sum expression (z-scored)',
        sprintf('%s — CPM top-1000 C3+ gene sum', vname),
        sprintf('Childhood [%d, %d), Adolescence [%d, %d)', FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE))
    p_box_cpm <- make_box_plot(prep_boxes42('cpm', FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE),
        'Sum expression (z-scored)',
        sprintf('CPM: Childhood [%d, %d) vs Adolescence [%d, %d)', FIX_CS, FIX_CE, FIX_AS, FIX_AE))
    p_traj_scanvi <- make_traj_plot(prep_pb42('scanvi'), b$child_start, b$gap_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_end,
        'Sum expression (z-scored)',
        sprintf('%s — scANVI top-1000 C3+ gene sum', vname),
        sprintf('Childhood [%d, %d), gap [%d, %d), Adolescence [%d, %d)',
                b$child_start, b$gap_start, b$gap_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_end))
    p_box_scanvi <- make_box_plot(prep_boxes42('scanvi', b$child_start, b$gap_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_end),
        'Sum expression (z-scored)',
        sprintf('scANVI: Childhood [%d, %d) vs Adolescence [%d, %d)',
                b$child_start, b$gap_start, b$adol_start, b$adol_end))

    (p_traj_cpm | p_box_cpm) / (p_traj_scanvi | p_box_scanvi) + plot_layout(guides = 'collect')
}
```

```{python}
display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 1: {version_names[0]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    print(make_uw_panel(version_names[1], uw_list[[version_names[1]]]))
))
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 2:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 2: {version_names[1]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 2) {
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        print(make_uw_panel(version_names[2], uw_list[[version_names[2]]]))
    ))
}
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 3:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 3: {version_names[2]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 3) {
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        print(make_uw_panel(version_names[3], uw_list[[version_names[3]]]))
    ))
}
```

```{python}
if len(version_names) >= 4:
    display(Markdown(f"\n#### Input 4: {version_names[3]}\n"))
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 280 -u mm -r 300

if (length(version_names) >= 4) {
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        print(make_uw_panel(version_names[4], uw_list[[version_names[4]]]))
    ))
}
```

### 4.3 V2 vs V3 C3+ sanity check (CPM, age 5–25)

```{python}
for _vname, _res in all_results.items():
    _fdf = _res['final_df']
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"=== {_vname} ===")
    print(f"{'='*60}")
    _inp = next(i for i in PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS if i['name'] == _vname)
    print(f"  Cell class filter: cell_class_col='{_inp.get('cell_class_col','')}'  "
          f"cell_class_value='{_inp.get('cell_class_value','')}'")

    _sc = _fdf[(_fdf['condition'] == 'cpm_all') & (_fdf['C'] == 'C3+')].copy()
    _sc['age_years'] = _sc['age_years'].astype(float)
    _sc['chem'] = _sc['source_chemistry'].astype(str).str.extract(r'(V[23])', expand=False)
    _sc25 = _sc[(_sc['age_years'] >= 5) & (_sc['age_years'] <= 25)]

    print(f"  CPM C3+ in age 5–25: n_donors={len(_sc25)}")
    for chem, grp in _sc25.groupby('chem'):
        print(f"\n  {chem}: n_donors={len(grp)}")
        print(f"    C3+ CPM — mean={grp['value'].mean():.1f}  median={grp['value'].median():.1f}")
        print(f"    age     — mean={grp['age_years'].mean():.1f}  "
              f"range [{grp['age_years'].min():.1f}, {grp['age_years'].max():.1f}]")

    _grp = _sc25.groupby('chem')['value'].mean()
    if 'V2' in _grp and 'V3' in _grp:
        _ratio = _grp['V2'] / _grp['V3']
        print(f"\n  V2/V3 mean ratio = {_ratio:.4f}  "
              f"({'V2 > V3' if _ratio > 1 else 'V2 < V3'})")
    del _sc, _sc25
```

## 5. Composition & per-cell-class diagnostics

Diagnostic outputs to investigate **why** Excitatory-only vs all-cells pseudobulks
give different developmental signals. Runs only when at least one `PSEUDOBULK_INPUT`
has `cell_class_col` set (i.e. is a by-cell-class file).

### 5.1 Donor-level cell-class composition

```{python}
_diag_bcc = [i for i in PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS if i.get('cell_class_col')]
_diag_all = next((i for i in PSEUDOBULK_INPUTS if not i.get('cell_class_col')), None)
_run_section5 = bool(_diag_bcc)

_MAJOR_CLASSES = ['Excitatory', 'Inhibitory', 'Astrocytes', 'Microglia', 'OPC', 'Oligos']

if not _run_section5:
    print("Skipping Section 5: no by-cell-class input configured.")
    _bcc = None
    _classes_present = []
    _frac = pd.DataFrame()
    _donor_meta = pd.DataFrame()
else:
    _bcc_input = _diag_bcc[0]
    _bcc_path  = _bcc_input['file']
    _cc_col    = _bcc_input['cell_class_col']
    print(f"by_cell_class reference: {_bcc_input['name']}")
    print(f"  Path: {_bcc_path}")
    print(f"  Class column: {_cc_col}")

    _bcc = sc.read_h5ad(_bcc_path)
    print(f"  Loaded shape: {_bcc.shape}")
    _classes_present = sorted(_bcc.obs[_cc_col].astype(str).unique().tolist())
    print(f"  Classes present: {_classes_present}")

    # Donor × class cell-count matrix and fraction matrix
    _comp = (_bcc.obs[['individual', _cc_col, 'n_cells']]
             .pivot_table(index='individual', columns=_cc_col,
                          values='n_cells', aggfunc='sum', fill_value=0))
    _frac = _comp.div(_comp.sum(axis=1), axis=0)

    # One row of metadata per donor
    _donor_obs = (_bcc.obs.drop_duplicates('individual')
                  .set_index('individual'))
    _donor_meta = pd.DataFrame(index=_comp.index)
    _donor_meta['age_years'] = _donor_obs['age_years'].reindex(_comp.index)
    for _col in ['chemistry', 'source', 'sex']:
        if _col in _donor_obs.columns:
            _donor_meta[_col] = _donor_obs[_col].reindex(_comp.index)

    n_donors_total = len(_comp)
    print(f"\nN donors with any cell-class pseudobulk: {n_donors_total}")
    _summary = pd.DataFrame({
        'mean_frac':              _frac.mean().round(3),
        'sd_frac':                _frac.std().round(3),
        'median_cells_per_donor': _comp.median().astype(int),
        'n_donors_with_class':    (_comp > 0).sum(),
    }).sort_values('mean_frac', ascending=False)
    print(f"\nMean cell-class composition across donors:")
    print(_summary.to_string())

    if 'chemistry' in _donor_meta.columns and _donor_meta['chemistry'].nunique() > 1:
        print(f"\nMean fraction × chemistry:")
        for chem, idx in _donor_meta.groupby('chemistry').groups.items():
            _row = _frac.loc[idx].mean().round(3)
            print(f"  {chem} (n={len(idx)}): "
                  + ", ".join(f"{c}={_row[c]:.2f}" for c in _frac.columns))
```

### 5.2 Cell-class fraction vs age

```{python}
if _run_section5:
    from scipy.stats import spearmanr
    _classes_to_test = [c for c in _MAJOR_CLASSES if c in _frac.columns]
    print(f"Spearman correlation of cell-class fraction vs age "
          f"(n={len(_donor_meta)} donors):")
    _ages = _donor_meta['age_years'].astype(float).values
    for c in _classes_to_test:
        _f = _frac[c].values
        _rho, _p = spearmanr(_ages, _f, nan_policy='omit')
        print(f"  {c:12s}  rho={_rho:+.3f}  p={_p:.3g}")

    if 'chemistry' in _donor_meta.columns and _donor_meta['chemistry'].nunique() > 1:
        print(f"\nSpearman by chemistry:")
        for c in _classes_to_test:
            for chem, idx in _donor_meta.groupby('chemistry').groups.items():
                _f_chem = _frac.loc[idx, c].values
                _a_chem = _donor_meta.loc[idx, 'age_years'].astype(float).values
                if len(_f_chem) >= 5:
                    _rho, _p = spearmanr(_a_chem, _f_chem, nan_policy='omit')
                    print(f"  {c:12s} [{chem}, n={len(_f_chem)}]  rho={_rho:+.3f}  p={_p:.3g}")

    # Build long-format dataframe for R plotting
    _frac_long_rows = []
    for c in _classes_to_test:
        _row = pd.DataFrame({
            'individual': _frac.index,
            'cell_class': c,
            'frac': _frac[c].values,
            'age_years': _donor_meta['age_years'].astype(float).values,
        })
        if 'chemistry' in _donor_meta.columns:
            _row['chemistry'] = _donor_meta['chemistry'].astype(str).values
        else:
            _row['chemistry'] = 'all'
        _frac_long_rows.append(_row)
    frac_long_df = pd.concat(_frac_long_rows, ignore_index=True)
    print(f"\nfrac_long_df: {frac_long_df.shape}")
else:
    frac_long_df = pd.DataFrame()
```

```{python}
%%R -w 220 -h 130 -u mm -r 300 -i frac_long_df

if (nrow(frac_long_df) > 0) {
    p <- ggplot(frac_long_df, aes(x = age_years, y = frac)) +
        facet_wrap(~ cell_class, scales = 'free_y', nrow = 2) +
        geom_point(aes(color = chemistry), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +
        geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = 'lm', se = FALSE,
                    color = 'black', linewidth = 0.5) +
        scale_x_continuous(name = 'Donor age (years)', limits = c(-1, 90)) +
        scale_y_continuous(name = 'Fraction of donor cells') +
        theme_classic() +
        theme(text = element_text(size = 8), strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
              strip.background = element_blank()) +
        ggtitle('Per-donor cell-class fraction vs age',
                subtitle = 'Color = chemistry (only meaningful for Velmeshev)')
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(print(p)))
} else {
    cat('No fraction data — Section 5 skipped.\n')
}
```

### 5.3 Per-cell-class C3+ developmental trend

For each major cell class, run the same CPM + scANVI projection and the same
4D sensitivity grid used in Section 3. Output: one row per class showing best
scANVI p-value, Cohen's d, and how many age-window combos pass p<0.05.

```{python}
cell_class_df = pd.DataFrame()
if _run_section5:
    _per_class_rows = []
    for _cls in _MAJOR_CLASSES:
        if _cls not in _classes_present:
            print(f"  Skipping {_cls}: not present in dataset")
            continue
        _a = _bcc[_bcc.obs[_cc_col].astype(str) == _cls].copy()
        if _a.n_obs < 5:
            print(f"  Skipping {_cls}: only {_a.n_obs} donors")
            continue

        # CPM
        _a.X = _a.layers['counts'].copy()
        sc.pp.normalize_total(_a, target_sum=1e6, inplace=True)
        _cpm_X = (_a.X.toarray() if _sp.issparse(_a.X) else _a.X).copy()
        _a.X = _cpm_X.copy()
        if 'highly_variable' in _a.var.columns:
            del _a.var['highly_variable']
        _scores_cpm = _project_and_collect(_a, ahba_GRN, 'cpm_all')

        # scANVI
        _scanvi_raw = _a.layers['scanvi_normalized']
        _scanvi_X = (_scanvi_raw.toarray() if _sp.issparse(_scanvi_raw)
                     else np.array(_scanvi_raw, dtype=np.float32)).copy()
        _a.X = _scanvi_X.copy()
        if 'highly_variable' in _a.var.columns:
            del _a.var['highly_variable']
        _scores_scanvi = _project_and_collect(_a, ahba_GRN, 'scanvi_all')

        # Metadata
        if 'source-chemistry' in _a.obs.columns:
            _sc = _a.obs['source-chemistry'].astype(str)
        elif 'chemistry' in _a.obs.columns:
            _sc = (_a.obs['source'].astype(str) + '-' +
                   _a.obs['chemistry'].astype(str))
        else:
            _sc = _a.obs['source'].astype(str)
        _meta = _a.obs[['individual', 'age_years', 'source']].copy()
        _meta['source_chemistry'] = _sc.values
        _meta['obs_names'] = _meta.index

        _fdf = (pd.concat([_scores_cpm, _scores_scanvi], ignore_index=True)
                  .merge(_meta, on='obs_names'))
        _fdf['cell_class'] = _cls
        _per_class_rows.append(_fdf)
        print(f"  {_cls}: n_donors={_a.n_obs}")
        del _a, _cpm_X, _scanvi_X
        gc.collect()

    if _per_class_rows:
        cell_class_df = pd.concat(_per_class_rows, ignore_index=True)
        print(f"\nCombined per-class df: {cell_class_df.shape}, "
              f"classes: {sorted(cell_class_df['cell_class'].unique().tolist())}")
```

```{python}
%%R -i cell_class_df -i CHILD_STARTS -i GAP_STARTS -i GAP_LENGTHS -i ADOL_ENDS

per_class_summary <- NULL
per_class_dec_df  <- NULL
per_class_best    <- list()

if (nrow(cell_class_df) > 0) {
    sel <- c('cpm_all', 'scanvi_all')
    classes_in <- unique(as.character(cell_class_df$cell_class))
    summary_rows <- list()
    per_class_dec_list <- list()
    for (cls in classes_in) {
        df_v <- cell_class_df %>% filter(cell_class == cls)
        df_prepped <- prepare_r_data_single(df_v, condition_order = sel)
        sens <- compute_sensitivity_4d(df_prepped, sel,
            child_starts = CHILD_STARTS, gap_starts = GAP_STARTS,
            gap_lengths  = GAP_LENGTHS, adol_ends  = ADOL_ENDS)
        best <- select_best_4d(sens, baseline = 'scanvi_all')
        per_class_best[[cls]] <- best
        n_d <- df_v %>% distinct(individual) %>% nrow()
        n_sig <- sum(sens$signif, na.rm = TRUE)
        n_total <- nrow(sens)
        summary_rows[[cls]] <- data.frame(
            cell_class = cls, n_donors = n_d,
            best_p = best$p_value, cohens_d = best$cohens_d,
            n_sig_combos = n_sig, n_total_combos = n_total,
            child_start = best$child_start, gap_start = best$gap_start,
            adol_start  = best$adol_start,  adol_end  = best$adol_end)
        per_class_dec_list[[cls]] <- df_prepped %>% mutate(cell_class = cls)
    }
    per_class_summary <- bind_rows(summary_rows) %>%
        mutate(p_label = case_when(
            best_p < 0.001 ~ '***',
            best_p < 0.01  ~ '**',
            best_p < 0.05  ~ '*',
            TRUE           ~ 'ns'))
    per_class_dec_df <- bind_rows(per_class_dec_list)
    cat('\nPer-cell-class C3+ best scANVI sensitivity:\n')
    print(per_class_summary, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
    cat('Section 5.3: no cell-class data — skipped.\n')
}
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 200 -u mm -r 300

if (!is.null(per_class_dec_df) && nrow(per_class_dec_df) > 0) {
    # Pseudobulk z-scored scANVI value per donor
    pb <- per_class_dec_df %>%
        filter(C == 'C3+', condition == 'scanvi_all') %>%
        group_by(cell_class, individual, age_years, source_chemistry) %>%
        summarize(value = mean(value), .groups = 'drop') %>%
        group_by(cell_class) %>%
        mutate(value = (value - mean(value)) / sd(value)) %>%
        ungroup()

    p_traj <- ggplot(pb, aes(x = age_years, y = value)) +
        facet_wrap(~ cell_class, scales = 'free_y', nrow = 2) +
        geom_point(aes(color = source_chemistry), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
        geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = 'loess', span = 0.9,
                    se = FALSE, color = 'black', linewidth = 0.4) +
        scale_x_continuous(name = 'Donor age (years)', limits = c(-1, 30),
                           breaks = seq(0, 30, 5)) +
        scale_y_continuous(name = 'C3+ scANVI (z-scored per class)') +
        theme_classic() +
        theme(text = element_text(size = 8), strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
              strip.background = element_blank()) +
        ggtitle('Per-cell-class C3+ developmental trajectory (scANVI)')
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(print(p_traj)))
}
```

```{python}
%%R -w 280 -h 180 -u mm -r 300

if (!is.null(per_class_dec_df) && nrow(per_class_dec_df) > 0 &&
    !is.null(per_class_summary)) {
    classes_in <- unique(as.character(per_class_dec_df$cell_class))
    boxes_list <- list()
    for (cls in classes_in) {
        b <- per_class_best[[cls]]
        df_v <- per_class_dec_df %>% filter(cell_class == cls)
        boxes <- make_boxes_gap_df(df_v %>% filter(condition == 'scanvi_all'),
                                   b$child_start, b$gap_start,
                                   b$adol_start, b$adol_end) %>%
            filter(network == 'C3+') %>%
            mutate(cell_class = cls,
                   value = (value - mean(value)) / sd(value))
        boxes_list[[cls]] <- boxes
    }
    boxes_all <- bind_rows(boxes_list)

    p_box <- ggplot(boxes_all, aes(x = age_range, y = value)) +
        facet_wrap(~ cell_class, scales = 'free', nrow = 2) +
        geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.4) +
        geom_jitter(aes(color = source_chemistry), width = 0.15,
                    size = 1.2, alpha = 0.6) +
        stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c('Childhood','Adolescence')),
                           label = 'p.signif', size = 3) +
        scale_y_continuous(name = 'C3+ scANVI (z-scored per class)') +
        coord_cartesian(clip = 'off') +
        theme_classic() +
        theme(text = element_text(size = 8), strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
              strip.background = element_blank(),
              axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),
              axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
        ggtitle('Per-class childhood vs adolescence (best scANVI age windows)')
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(print(p_box)))
}
```

### 5.4 Donor inclusion / cell-count comparison

```{python}
if _run_section5 and _diag_all is not None:
    print(f"Excitatory-filter input: {_diag_bcc[0]['name']} (file={_diag_bcc[0]['file']})")
    print(f"All-cells input:         {_diag_all['name']} (file={_diag_all['file']})")

    _all_h = sc.read_h5ad(_diag_all['file'], backed='r')
    _all_donors = set(_all_h.obs['individual'].astype(str).unique())
    _all_age = (_all_h.obs.drop_duplicates('individual')
                .set_index('individual')['age_years']
                .astype(float).to_dict())
    _all_chem = None
    if 'chemistry' in _all_h.obs.columns:
        _all_chem = (_all_h.obs.drop_duplicates('individual')
                     .set_index('individual')['chemistry'].astype(str).to_dict())
    _all_h.file.close()

    _exc_filter = _diag_bcc[0]['cell_class_value']
    _exc_mask = _bcc.obs[_cc_col].astype(str) == _exc_filter
    _exc_donors = set(_bcc.obs.loc[_exc_mask, 'individual'].astype(str).unique())

    _only_exc = _exc_donors - _all_donors
    _only_all = _all_donors - _exc_donors
    _both     = _exc_donors & _all_donors

    print(f"\nDonor sets:")
    print(f"  Excitatory ({_exc_filter}): n={len(_exc_donors)}")
    print(f"  All-cells              : n={len(_all_donors)}")
    print(f"  In both                : n={len(_both)}")
    print(f"  Only in Excitatory     : n={len(_only_exc)}")
    print(f"  Only in all-cells      : n={len(_only_all)}")

    def _age_summary(s, donor_set):
        ages = [_all_age.get(d, np.nan) for d in donor_set]
        ages = [a for a in ages if np.isfinite(a)]
        if not ages:
            return "  (no ages)"
        return (f"  ages — min={min(ages):.2f}  median={np.median(ages):.2f}  "
                f"max={max(ages):.2f}")

    if _only_all:
        print(f"\nDonors only in all-cells (not in Excitatory):")
        print(_age_summary('only_all', _only_all))
        _rows = sorted([(d, _all_age.get(d, np.nan),
                         (_all_chem or {}).get(d, '-'))
                        for d in _only_all], key=lambda x: x[1])
        for d, a, ch in _rows[:30]:
            print(f"  {d}  age={a:.2f}  chem={ch}")
        if len(_rows) > 30:
            print(f"  … ({len(_rows) - 30} more)")
    if _only_exc:
        print(f"\nDonors only in Excitatory (not in all-cells):")
        print(_age_summary('only_exc', _only_exc))
elif _run_section5:
    print("Skipping 5.4: no all-cells input configured.")
```

### 5.5 V2/V3 chemistry sensitivity (Velmeshev only)

If the dataset mixes V2 and V3 chemistries, re-run the 4D sensitivity grid on
the V3-only subset of `all_cells_by_donor` to test whether the apparent
all-cells signal depends on the chemistry mix.

```{python}
v3_compare_df = pd.DataFrame()
if (_run_section5 and _diag_all is not None and 'chemistry'
        in _bcc.obs.columns and _bcc.obs['chemistry'].nunique() > 1):
    _has_chem = True
    print(f"Chemistry values in by_cell_class: "
          f"{sorted(_bcc.obs['chemistry'].astype(str).unique().tolist())}")

    # Find the full all-cells final_df from earlier projection
    _all_name = _diag_all['name']
    _all_fdf  = all_results[_all_name]['final_df']
    _all_fdf  = _all_fdf.copy()
    _all_fdf['chem'] = (_all_fdf['source_chemistry'].astype(str)
                       .str.extract(r'(V[23])', expand=False))

    # Full + V3-only versions, tagged for R sensitivity grid
    _full = _all_fdf.assign(subset='all_chemistries')
    _v3   = _all_fdf[_all_fdf['chem'] == 'V3'].assign(subset='V3_only')

    # Also subset the Excitatory final_df
    _exc_name = _diag_bcc[0]['name']
    _exc_fdf = all_results[_exc_name]['final_df'].copy()
    _exc_fdf['chem'] = (_exc_fdf['source_chemistry'].astype(str)
                       .str.extract(r'(V[23])', expand=False))
    _exc_full = _exc_fdf.assign(subset='all_chemistries')
    _exc_v3   = _exc_fdf[_exc_fdf['chem'] == 'V3'].assign(subset='V3_only')

    v3_compare_df = pd.concat([
        _full.assign(pb_kind='all_cells'),
        _v3.assign(pb_kind='all_cells'),
        _exc_full.assign(pb_kind='excitatory'),
        _exc_v3.assign(pb_kind='excitatory'),
    ], ignore_index=True)
    print(f"\nv3_compare_df: {v3_compare_df.shape}")
    print(f"  subset counts: {v3_compare_df.groupby(['pb_kind','subset'])['individual'].nunique().to_dict()}")
else:
    _has_chem = False
    print("Skipping 5.5: chemistry column absent or only one chemistry present.")
```

```{python}
%%R -i v3_compare_df -i CHILD_STARTS -i GAP_STARTS -i GAP_LENGTHS -i ADOL_ENDS

if (nrow(v3_compare_df) > 0) {
    sel <- c('cpm_all', 'scanvi_all')
    keys <- unique(v3_compare_df %>% select(pb_kind, subset))
    rows <- list()
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(keys))) {
        pk <- keys$pb_kind[i]
        ss <- keys$subset[i]
        df_v <- v3_compare_df %>% filter(pb_kind == pk, subset == ss)
        if (nrow(df_v) == 0) next
        df_p <- prepare_r_data_single(df_v, condition_order = sel)
        sens <- compute_sensitivity_4d(df_p, sel,
            child_starts = CHILD_STARTS, gap_starts = GAP_STARTS,
            gap_lengths  = GAP_LENGTHS, adol_ends  = ADOL_ENDS)
        b <- select_best_4d(sens, baseline = 'scanvi_all')
        n_d <- df_v %>% distinct(individual) %>% nrow()
        n_sig <- sum(sens$signif, na.rm = TRUE)
        rows[[i]] <- data.frame(
            pb_kind = pk, subset = ss, n_donors = n_d,
            best_p = b$p_value, cohens_d = b$cohens_d,
            n_sig_combos = n_sig, n_total_combos = nrow(sens),
            child_start = b$child_start, gap_start = b$gap_start,
            adol_start  = b$adol_start,  adol_end  = b$adol_end)
    }
    v3_summary <- bind_rows(rows) %>%
        mutate(p_label = case_when(
            best_p < 0.001 ~ '***', best_p < 0.01 ~ '**',
            best_p < 0.05  ~ '*',   TRUE          ~ 'ns'))
    cat('\nV3-only vs all-chemistries best scANVI sensitivity:\n')
    print(v3_summary, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
    cat('Section 5.5 skipped (no chemistry variation).\n')
}
```
